fields.summary: Draws the contents of a surface onto this canvas at the specified point using the given sampling options and paint.

params.paint: The paint to apply when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> (default) to draw without additional effects.
params.sampling: The sampling options that control how the surface pixels are filtered.
params.p: The destination point at which the top-left corner of the surface is placed.
params.surface: The surface whose contents to draw.

entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws the contents of a surface onto this canvas at the specified coordinates using the given sampling options and paint.

params.paint: The paint to apply when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> (default) to draw without additional effects.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the top-left corner of the destination.
params.sampling: The sampling options that control how the surface pixels are filtered.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the top-left corner of the destination.
params.surface: The surface whose contents to draw.

entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);
